board.race_name: THE FUTURE OF RACING PGR TV STAKES
SPORTSBET SUPPORTERS OF HAVING A CRACK
PRIX DE LA SOURCE DE BUGLOSE
FERNESS @ SIRES ON ICE MAX 150 PTS
HOMING DOGS WITH HOME RUN HOUNDS STAKES
BOOK A WINNING DEAL FOR 15 STAKES

G:RIC:7:2026-07-08.comment: 2. NOIR was favourite last start and led all the way, scoring by 3.5 lengths (22.77) at this track in a Grade 5 over 401m. Winner at his latest appearance in one of the quickest times on the card. In form and can go on with it. 1. ZIPPING MONROE comes into this as a quickest on the card winner last time at this track, scoring by 2.25 lengths (22.71). Leading player again. 8. ZIPPING VIOLET finished in the placings last time but could not have been more impressive before that in her strong 29.78 win at Wentworth Park over 520m. Expecting another bold showing. 3. LITTLE KADE comes into calculations after placing most recently.

runners.name: ZIPPING VIOLET
runners.comment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 1.75 lengths third (29.67) over 520m at Wentworth Park. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on her best form.

runners.name: NOIR
runners.comment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 401m at this track by 3.5 lengths in a Grade 5. In top form and can make it three straight.

runners.name: ZIPPING MONROE
runners.comment: Last start winner at this track over this distance running a time of 22.71. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

runners.name: DOMINEERING
runners.comment: Won two starts back at this track over 401m in 22.92. Followed that up with a minor placing over 401m at this track at Grade 4/5 a week ago. Hard to recommend this time.

runners.name: ANJO RUBY
runners.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by 1.75 lengths at this track (18.10) beating James Alarm in a Grade 4/5 on May 27. Better off looking to others.

runners.name: LITTLE KADE
runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (18.65) over 320m at this track. Has a low draw. Others preferred.

runners.name: WELL KEPT SECRET
runners.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on July 3 over 320m at this track behind Midnight Smoke beaten 2.25 lengths (18.75). Others preferred on this occasion.

runners.name: TARAWI QUEENIE
runners.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (23.18) over 401m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome. Looks to have the job ahead.

runners.name: SPRING DAZZLER
runners.comment: Could only manage seventh last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when second (23.11) over 401m at this track. Prefer the place this line-up.

G:MNM:5:2026-07-08.comment: 4. LONGACRES FIRE turned in a plain performance last time when sixth at this track over 264m behind Highway Blue (16.74) in a D4. The form out of her last race has been franked. Has winning claims on her best figures. 5. TULLYMURRY OTTO wasn't far away at the finish when 4th and beaten only 3.5 lengths (16.30) at this track. Key runner who gets his chance to atone. 1. FOURPENNY JILL has shown good improvement at her last two starts, finishing in the money last time when 3rd at this track over 264m. Leading chance. 3. YAMA CHICKEN showed some ability on debut here and is given another chance. Can feature with the right run.

runners.name: CUP OF SHERRY
runners.comment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 264m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

runners.name: MUCKY DANNO
runners.comment: Resumes from a three-and-a-half months spell and was in the minors at only other fresh up run, finishing third over 480m at this track. Not keen this time.

runners.name: TULLYMURRY OTTO
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 4th on July 2 over 264m at this track behind Still Moment beaten 3.5 lengths (16.30) in a D4. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

runners.name: FOURPENNY JILL
runners.comment: Nearing another win after her success on May 20 at this track over 264m. Last start was third over 264m in 16.27, behind Still Moment. Thereabouts at her last couple and is capable of better.

runners.name: YAMA CHICKEN
runners.comment: Last start finished sixth in a D4 on July 2 over 264m at this track behind Still Moment, beaten 8 lengths (16.70). Major threat on best form.

runners.name: LONGACRES FIRE
runners.comment: Latest effort finished last on June 27 over 264m at this track behind Highway Blue beaten 9 lengths (16.74) in a D4. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

R:KAW:11:2026-07-08.comment: 8. TAGANO MIST defied a lack of market support last start, scoring by a neck over 1400m in the LR RITTO STAKES at Kyoto Dirt. Should be prominent from the outset. Will give a great sight. 3. TAMAMO FREESIA met with solid support when resuming last start over 2100m at this track when fourth, beaten 10 lengths. Can bounce back. 7. HOLY GRAIL is back from a spell of 11 weeks. Turned in a fair effort at Urawa over 1400m at her only run last prep, finishing fourth and beaten 2 lengths. Takayuki Yano who has scored on her three times retains the mount. Sure to be competitive. 9. ANGE FIELD was narrowly beaten at her latest appearance at Urawa over 1400m 11 weeks ago. Can make her presence felt.

runners.name: TAGANO MIST
runners.comment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 52-day let-up. At the latest run won by a neck at Kyoto Dirt LR RITTO STAKES May 17 over 1400m defeating Bergeronnette carrying 55.0kg at $16.60. The race before that held ground to the line 2nd of 15 at Fukushima Dirt on April 11 over 1700m, 1.3 len behind Rata Forest with 55.0kg at $16.30. Hard to beat again.

runners.name: APPEALING LOOK
runners.comment: Second-up. Comes off a 56-day let-up. First-up after three months failed to make an impression; 5th of 8 at this track on May 13 over 2100m, 6 len behind Memoria Cafe with 55kg at $5.70. Previously second-up 4th of 13 at Funabashi on February 11 over 1800m, 7 len behind Tenka Jo carrying 56kg at $4.50. Worth consideration.

runners.name: HOLY GRAIL
runners.comment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last preparation made some head-way from midfield; 4th of 13 at Urawa on April 22 over 1400m, 2 len behind Two Shadow carrying 57kg at $2.20. Won previous preparation first up favourite; ran on from midfield and won by a neck at Sonoda November 6 over 1400m defeating K's Reve carrying 55kg at $16. Look for a bold run.

runners.name: TAMAMO FREESIA
runners.comment: Having second run back today. Last run 4th of 14 at this track on June 17 over 2100m, 10 len behind Pendant carrying 55kg at $2.50. At only start last preparation ran second last of 7 at Ohi on March 25 over 1700m, 10 len behind Rock Ptarmigan carrying 54kg at $4.60. Among the top chances.

runners.name: ANGE FIELD
runners.comment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation second of 13 at Urawa April 22 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Two Shadow carrying 54kg at $3.60. Previously first up; seventh of 16 at Hanshin Dirt December 21 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Trillion Boy with 56.0kg at $11.60. Anticipate a bold showing.

runners.name: KA PILINA
runners.comment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resumes off a 52 day letup. First-up ran second last of 10 at Hanshin in the G2 Hanshin Himba Stakes on April 11 over 1600m, 7 len behind Embroidery carrying 55.0kg at $14.10. Last start sat behind the speed prior to fading ran second last of 18 at Tokyo in the G1 Victoria Mile on May 17 over 1600m, 7 len behind Embroidery with 56.0kg at $127.30. Genuine hope.

runners.name: MARBLE MACARON
runners.comment: First-up. Finished off last preparation tenth of 13 at Urawa April 22 over 1400m, 6 len behind Two Shadow carrying 54kg at $17.50. Previously first up; sixth of 9 at Ohi November 13 over 1600m, 7 len behind Giselle carrying 54kg at $3.10. Others are preferred.

runners.name: PROUD FLEUR
runners.comment: Second-up. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after four months 9th of 13 at Urawa on May 27 over 1400m, 7 len behind Exult carrying 54kg at $14.60. Previously second-up ran last of 14 at Funabashi on November 3 over 1800m, 23 len behind Ammothyella with 53kg at $14.20. Unlikely to threaten.

runners.name: TWO SHADOW
runners.comment: Comes here off a 42-day let-up. At the latest run 7th of 13 at Urawa on May 27 over 1400m, 7 len behind Exult carrying 54kg at $41.60. The start before that won by 0.5 len at Urawa April 22 over 1400m defeating Ange Field carrying 56kg at $8.60. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

runners.name: L'ECRIN SOURIRE
runners.comment: Most recently ran second last of 7 at Kasamatsu on June 25 over 1400m, 8 len behind Nihonpiro Reach carrying 55kg at $68.10. The start before that ran second last of 10 at Kasamatsu on June 10 over 1400m, 10 len behind Zinfin Doll carrying 55kg at $17.60. Wait until she shows more.

R:DAX:6:2026-07-08.comment: 4. ZELICA recorded a good effort placing 5L second over 2400m at Bordeaux. Selected to record a victory dropping in distance. 6. MOREA followed up a close second at Toulouse with a 5.75L fourth in the previously mentioned Bordeaux event. Expected to be playing a role in the finish. 2. NIKITA DU MAZET faded late running 6.75L fifth tackling 1800m in a claiming handicap at Langon-Libourne. One to note with a tongue tie applied for the first time. Successful twice last year 1. ASSIER is another with claims after managing a 9.75L seventh contesting the previously mentioned Langon-Libourne event.

runners.name: MOREA
runners.comment: Recent form sound. Most recently made ground from midfield; 4th of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 6 len behind Nekoleto carrying 52.5kg at $8.70. The race before that held ground to the line 2nd of 11 at Toulouse on May 27 over 2400m, head behind Starecto with 52.5kg at $11. Finds a suitable race and looks one of the key runners.

runners.name: ULTRASOUND
runners.comment: At the latest run 6th of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 6 len behind Nekoleto carrying 54kg at $5.80. The race before that 3rd of 11 at Toulouse on May 27 over 2400m, 0.5 len behind Starecto with 54kg at $4.70. Better placed and expected to be in the finish.

runners.name: ZELICA
runners.comment: At the latest run 2nd of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 5 len behind Nekoleto with 52.5kg at $12. The race before that 6th of 15 at Toulouse on June 8 over 2200m, 3.5 len behind Pop Life with 52.5kg at $32. Worth following.

runners.name: PRAY FOR HOPE
runners.comment: Most recently 7th of 12 at Longchamp on June 11 over 2400m, 2.5 len behind Brivido Moon with 53.5kg at $4.50. The run before that settled back and ran on when 6th of 8 at Salon-de-Provence on May 25 over 2400m, 3 len behind Hashtag Joa carrying 54kg at $6.90. Among the top chances.

runners.name: MOON OF THE NIGHT
runners.comment: Most recently 7th of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 8 len behind Nekoleto with 54.5kg at $19. The race before that 6th of 13 at Tarbes on May 11 over 2100m, slow going 3 len behind Sedition with 55kg at $16. Hard to beat on her best form.

runners.name: AMORETTI
runners.comment: Second-up. First-up after seven months 14th of 16 at La Teste De Buch on June 3 over 1900m, 12 len behind Lady Darka carrying 51.5kg at $23. Previously second-up ran last of 12 at this track on May 1 2025 over 2300m, 7 len behind Peyrassol carrying 58.5kg at $63. Expecting him to kick on with that first run out of the way.

runners.name: NIKITA DU MAZET
runners.comment: At the latest run 5th of 10 at Langon-Libourne on June 19 over 1800m, 6 len behind Wathab with 64.5kg. The run before that faded in the straight 9th of 15 at Toulouse on June 8 over 2200m, 12 len behind Pop Life carrying 53kg at $18. Can do a lot better than that last run.

runners.name: ASSIER
runners.comment: Last start 7th of 10 at Langon-Libourne on June 19 over 1800m, 9 len behind Wathab carrying 66kg. The race before that 4th in a small field at Limoges on May 17 over 2400m, slow going 2.5 len behind Agelka with 66kg. Better than the last run suggests and can make amends.

runners.name: MA CHERIE AMOUR
runners.comment: Returns from a 30-day let-up. Most recently 13th of 15 at Toulouse on June 8 over 2200m, 17 len behind Pop Life carrying 52.5kg at $47. Before that 10th of 13 at Tarbes on May 11 over 2100m, slow going 6 len behind Sedition with 54.5kg at $19. Must improve sharply.

runners.name: PINTXOPOTE
runners.comment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Not raced for 61 days. Resuming ran last in a small field at Agen on April 26 over 3200m, slow going 46 len behind Wukolina carrying 66kg. Second run from a spell 6th of 8 at Gabarret on May 8 over 2550m, 26 len behind Atlantigo carrying 54.5kg. Prepared to risk.

runners.name: ASHUTOR
runners.comment: Second-up. First-up after 10 months 13th of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 21 len behind Nekoleto carrying 51.5kg at $74. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at Cazaubon Barbotan Therme on September 1 over 3600m, on a slow track; 28 len behind Olkar carrying 64kg. Best form is over the jumps and looks safely held.

G:MEA:8:2026-07-08.comment: 1. OVERLAND BOY stalked the lead and fought on well to finish 3.5 lengths away in third (34.48) at Sandown in a Special conditions G2 over 595m. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last start despite being beaten. Deserves serious consideration. 5. MY MATE LEO hit the ground running from this same draw last time and led all the way to score (35.21) in a Grade 5 over 600m at this track. Harder here but expected to measure up. 4. FILL MY POCKETS has found the minor placings here at last couple of runs, finishing third last time beaten 2 lengths (35.35). No wins but has five minors at this course. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minor placings. Overdue and is among the main hopes. 7. GREYSYND SAMMY placed two runs ago then again in the money last time when third (34.65) at this track in a Mix 3/4.

runners.name: OVERLAND BOY
runners.comment: Hit the frame latest (34.48) when third at Sandown in a Special conditions G2. Has two successes and five minors from 10 starts from box 1. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

runners.name: MY MATE LEO
runners.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 600m in 35.21 last start, beating Maximum Reed. Expected to measure up again.

runners.name: MAXIMUM REED
runners.comment: Has been in the money at last three starts, the latest at big odds when second (35.28) at this track. Has a low draw. Has to do a bit more.

runners.name: AUNTY FAYE
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 600m at this track. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

runners.name: GREYSYND SAMMY
runners.comment: Placed last time (34.65) at this track in a Mix 3/4, finishing third and beaten 3 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and five places from 13 starts. Among the chances on best.

runners.name: FILL MY POCKETS
runners.comment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when third (35.35) over 600m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Must be included.

ref.race_name: THE FUTURE OF RACING PGR TV STAKES

G:NAM:4:2026-07-08.comment: 5. STARTING POINT returned from a break with a 6 length win in an A6 at this track over 500m (30.59). Stiffer grade this time but hard to knock latest effort. Stick with her. 2. HONOUR FLYER jumped from this trap last time and also the same course and distance when a 2.75 lengths third (30.85) in an A4. Must include in calculations. 6. CRAFTY ELMO stuck on well last time to finish a head back in second (30.31) at this track in an A4 over 500m. Can feature again. 3. AYUP CHEWIE missed the placings here most recently but can sneak into the finish with the right run.

runners.name: STARTING POINT
runners.comment: Solid performance to win by 6 lengths at this track over 500m (30.59) beating Wolf Eclipse in A6 on July 2. Back in great order and makes plenty of appeal again.

runners.name: CRAFTY ELMO
runners.comment: Rocketed out of the boxes with a scorching early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (30.31) at this track over 500m. Should be around the mark.

runners.name: AYUP CHEWIE
runners.comment: Latest effort finished last on July 1 over 500m at this track behind Aero Floral beaten 10 lengths (31.47) in an A4. Must be included.

runners.name: HONOUR FLYER
runners.comment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (30.85) over 500m at this track. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

runners.name: HONOUR BELLIE
runners.comment: Has finished fifth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 4.5 lengths behind Aero Floral over 500m. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

runners.name: IN FORM LADY
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 500m at this track. Likely to struggle this time.

G:CNP:3:2026-07-08.comment: 1. BROWNIE POINTS finished towards the tail latest and yet to show much in two runs. Scored a Cannington trial win over 520m since. Great chance to atone. 7. PEGRUM CITY makes debut for the Enzo Crudeli kennel. Start all important and will need some luck getting across from the wide draw. Can sneak into the frame at his first appearance.

runners.name: PEGRUM CITY
runners.comment: Debutant by Orson Allen from Akachi. From the Enzo Crudeli kennel. Might pay to watch for a market push.

runners.name: KING KOMODO
runners.comment: First starter by Bernardo from Miss America. From the Krystal Shinners kennel. Market the only real guide to his chances.

runners.name: ASTON NEGRONI
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 520m at this track. Hard to tip with any confidence.

runners.name: BROWNIE POINTS
runners.comment: Finished off last campaign with a seventh (31.06) in a MDN at this track three months ago. Expected to be tough to beat.

runners.name: EXILE FURY
runners.comment: Yet to break through after five starts, the most recent result a fifth (31.41) over 520m at this track. Others rate better.

runners.name: NEGATIVE
runners.comment: Finished third last start (30.60) at big odds over 520m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Looking to others.

runners.name: GO GETTEM CHIVAS
runners.comment: First starter by Hooked On Scotch from Go Gettem Marls. Trained by Ben Abercrombie. Keep a close eye on the market.

G:NOW:10:2026-07-08.comment: 4. ZIPPING LUMIERE has shown good improvement at his last two starts, finishing in the money last time when 2nd at Richmond over 520m. Must come into calculations. 1. ZIPPING WEBB failed to come into contention last start after drifting back at this track, but prior to that won by 2 lengths at this track (30.73) beating Majestic Pearl in a Grade 5 on June 25. Yet to win out of this box but has been in the placings four times from six starts. Cannot be left out. 2. TWISTED HUXLEY produced a moderate performance last time when sixth at this track over 365m behind Princess Ada (21.65) in a Grade 5. Was in the money the start prior. Strong form has emerged from his last run. Great chance to atone. 8. ASHBY COLA gets a chance to improve on an unplaced run at his latest outing at this circuit.

runners.name: TWISTED HUXLEY
runners.comment: Missed the frame latest (21.65) when sixth over 365m at this track in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

runners.name: ASHBY COLA
runners.comment: Showed strong early pace and stuck on well despite finishing out of the placings when fourth over 630m this track in 37.15. Looks a solid contender.

runners.name: ZIPPING LUMIERE
runners.comment: In the money last time at Richmond (30.03) in a Mix, finishing a 0.8 lengths second. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Has ability and should feature.

runners.name: STILL SHADY
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (30.43) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 12 lengths. Yet to score but has placed each of two runs from this draw. Among the main chances.

runners.name: ANY MORE CARAMEL
runners.comment: Dropping back in distance from his last start when second over 630m at this track. Has struggled in the past over this trip. Not keen this time.

runners.name: ZIPPING WEBB
runners.comment: Missed the frame latest (37.36) when sixth over 630m at this track in a Mix. Yet to win but has placed four times from this draw. Looks suited and should go close.

runners.name: ANGRY GOLIATH
runners.comment: Missed the frame last start when a 13 length fifth (30.53) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at this track. Others rate better this time.

runners.name: ANOTHER ASSET
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time when seventh (30.94) at Wentworth Park in a Grade 5. Will jump from box 7 for the first time. Looking to others.

runners.name: GOLFER GIRL
runners.comment: Last start finished 5th over 365m at this track beaten 7 lengths (21.44) behind Night Country in a Grade 5 on June 25. Well placed and among the chances here.

G:ROC:8:2026-07-08.comment: 1. FAST FREDDY was sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 1.5 lengths second (23.69) over 407m at this track. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Rates highly and will give a great sight. 7. NUKA ran below best last time finishing seventh (29.52) over 498m at Townsville from Box 4. Has ability and is one of the better chances. 3. REGAL WOLF has a strong record this track and trip with 10 wins and seven placings from 27 starts. Hit the frame latest (23.54) when second at this track in a Free For All. Can feature in the finish. 2. LEGENDS TOLD comes off a (23.85) win last time, scoring by 5 lengths in a Grade 4/5 over 407m at this track. Has one wins already from this draw.

runners.name: FAST FREDDY
runners.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 1.5 lengths second (23.69) over 407m at this track. Goes very well from this draw including three wins. Leading player.

runners.name: HUDSON RIVERLINE
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 407m at this track. Can't recommend against this lot.

runners.name: REGAL WOLF
runners.comment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 2.25 lengths second but did record an exceptional 23.54 over the 407m journey. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

runners.name: UNTAMED VELOCITY
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 407m at this track. Hard to tip with any confidence.

runners.name: HOW'S WARREN
runners.comment: Has been in the money the last two runs. Finished second at this track in 23.72 last time but the start prior recorded a respectable 23.71 over 407m finishing second at this track. Prefer others this time.

runners.name: LEGENDS TOLD
runners.comment: Hit the ground running last time with a fast early split and never headed, leading throughout to win by 5 lengths (23.85) over 407m at this track. This appears within her reach.

runners.name: SIRIUS TODD
runners.comment: Good effort to win last start by a neck over 407m at this track in a handy (24.07), beating Dream Queen. Will find this a bit tougher, hard to envisage a win.

runners.name: NUKA
runners.comment: Last start finished last in a Grade 4/5 on June 16 over 498m at Townsville behind Federal Cash beaten 6 lengths (29.52). Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

G:KIK:9:2026-07-08.comment: 4. ABIGAILS MAX is progressing well and looks close to another win after hitting the frame last run (29.88) at this track. Key chance in this line up. 6. GIDDYUP ADELE drew the outside trap and was game in defeat when only a head from the winner Comer Queen (30.02) at this track. Overdue and gets her chance. 2. SWIFT QUIVER was strongly fancied on the back of a win two starts ago but finished fifth last time (30.68) at this track. Worth another chance. 1. SHOOK UP will give backers a sight.

runners.name: BREAKAWAY HUNTER
runners.comment: Going well prior to missing the frame last start when well-fancied, finishing sixth in 30.69 over 480m at this track. This will test.

runners.name: COMER HONDO
runners.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd over 480m at this track beaten one length (30.24) behind Ballygur Nelly in an A4 on July 1. Hard to have this time.

runners.name: ABIGAILS MAX
runners.comment: Improved sharply when second behind Aces Alf at this track last start over 480m (29.88). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.

runners.name: SHOOK UP
runners.comment: Has only been in the placings once from six starts. Last raced when fifth over 480m at this track a week ago. Racing well and has to be included.

runners.name: SWIFT QUIVER
runners.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 3 lengths in 29.46, beating Danny Saysta. Last start finished 5th in an A4 on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Ballygur Nelly beaten 7 lengths (30.68). Leading chance on best form.

runners.name: GIDDYUP ADELE
runners.comment: Last start finished 2nd over 480m at this track beaten a head (30.02) behind Comer Queen in an A5 on July 1. Has the ability to take this out.

runners.name: NOIR
runners.comment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 401m at this track by 3.5 lengths in a Grade 5. In top form and can make it three straight.

runners.name: ZIPPING MONROE
runners.comment: Last start winner at this track over this distance running a time of 22.71. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

runners.name: DOMINEERING
runners.comment: Won two starts back at this track over 401m in 22.92. Followed that up with a minor placing over 401m at this track at Grade 4/5 a week ago. Hard to recommend this time.

HOLY GRAIL is back from a spell of 11 weeks. Turned in a fair effort at Urawa over 1400m at her only run last prep, finishing fourth and beaten 2 lengths. Takayuki Yano who has scored on her three times retains the mount. Sure to be competitive. 9. ANGE FIELD was narrowly beaten at her latest appearance at Urawa over 1400m 11 weeks ago. Can make her presence felt.

runners.name: TAGANO MIST
runners.comment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 52-day let-up. At the latest run won by a neck at Kyoto Dirt LR RITTO STAKES May 17 over 1400m defeating Bergeronnette carrying 55.0kg at $16.60. The race before that held ground to the line 2nd of 15 at Fukushima Dirt on April 11 over 1700m, 1.3 len behind Rata Forest with 55.0kg at $16.30. Hard to beat again.

runners.name: APPEALING LOOK
runners.comment: Second-up. Comes off a 56-day let-up. First-up after three months failed to make an impression; 5th of 8 at this track on May 13 over 2100m, 6 len behind Memoria Cafe with 55kg at $5.70. Previously second-up 4th of 13 at Funabashi on February 11 over 1800m, 7 len behind Tenka Jo carrying 56kg at $4.50. Worth consideration.

runners.name: HOLY GRAIL
runners.comment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last preparation made some head-way from midfield; 4th of 13 at Urawa on April 22 over 1400m, 2 len behind Two Shadow carrying 57kg at $2.20. Won previous preparation first up favourite; ran on from midfield and won by a neck at Sonoda November 6 over 1400m defeating K's Reve carrying 55kg at $16. Look for a bold run.

runners.name: TAMAMO FREESIA
runners.comment: Having second run back today. Last run 4th of 14 at this track on June 17 over 2100m, 10 len behind Pendant carrying 55kg at $2.50. At only start last preparation ran second last of 7 at Ohi on March 25 over 1700m, 10 len behind Rock Ptarmigan carrying 54kg at $4.60. Among the top chances.

runners.name: ANGE FIELD
runners.comment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation second of 13 at Urawa April 22 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Two Shadow carrying 54kg at $3.60. Previously first up; seventh of 16 at Hanshin Dirt December 21 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Trillion Boy with 56.0kg at $11.60. Anticipate a bold showing.

runners.name: KA PILINA
runners.comment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resumes off a 52 day letup. First-up ran second last of 10 at Hanshin in the G2 Hanshin Himba Stakes on April 11 over 1600m, 7 len behind Embroidery carrying 55.0kg at $14.10. Last start sat behind the speed prior to fading ran second last of 18 at Tokyo in the G1 Victoria Mile on May 17 over 1600m, 7 len behind Embroidery with 56.0kg at $127.30. Genuine hope.

runners.name: MARBLE MACARON
runners.comment: First-up. Finished off last preparation tenth of 13 at Urawa April 22 over 1400m, 6 len behind Two Shadow carrying 54kg at $17.50. Previously first up; sixth of 9 at Ohi November 13 over 1600m, 7 len behind Giselle carrying 54kg at $3.10. Others are preferred.

runners.name: PROUD FLEUR
runners.comment: Second-up. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after four months 9th of 13 at Urawa on May 27 over 1400m, 7 len behind Exult carrying 54kg at $14.60. Previously second-up ran last of 14 at Funabashi on November 3 over 1800m, 23 len behind Ammothyella with 53kg at $14.20. Unlikely to threaten.

runners.name: TWO SHADOW
runners.comment: Comes here off a 42-day let-up. At the latest run 7th of 13 at Urawa on May 27 over 1400m, 7 len behind Exult carrying 54kg at $41.60. The start before that won by 0.5 len at Urawa April 22 over 1400m defeating Ange Field carrying 56kg at $8.60. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

runners.name: L'ECRIN SOURIRE
runners.comment: Most recently ran second last of 7 at Kasamatsu on June 25 over 1400m, 8 len behind Nihonpiro Reach carrying 55kg at $68.10. The start before that ran second last of 10 at Kasamatsu on June 10 over 1400m, 10 len behind Zinfin Doll carrying 55kg at $17.60. Wait until she shows more.

R:DAX:6:2026-07-08.comment: 4. ZELICA recorded a good effort placing 5L second over 2400m at Bordeaux. Selected to record a victory dropping in distance. 6. MOREA followed up a close second at Toulouse with a 5.75L fourth in the previously mentioned Bordeaux event. Expected to be playing a role in the finish. 2. NIKITA DU MAZET faded late running 6.75L fifth tackling 1800m in a claiming handicap at Langon-Libourne. One to note with a tongue tie applied for the first time. Successful twice last year 1. ASSIER is another with claims after managing a 9.75L seventh contesting the previously mentioned Langon-Libourne event.

runners.name: MOREA
runners.comment: Recent form sound. Most recently made ground from midfield; 4th of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 6 len behind Nekoleto carrying 52.5kg at $8.70. The race before that held ground to the line 2nd of 11 at Toulouse on May 27 over 2400m, head behind Starecto with 52.5kg at $11. Finds a suitable race and looks one of the key runners.

runners.name: ULTRASOUND
runners.comment: At the latest run 6th of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 6 len behind Nekoleto carrying 54kg at $5.80. The race before that 3rd of 11 at Toulouse on May 27 over 2400m, 0.5 len behind Starecto with 54kg at $4.70. Better placed and expected to be in the finish.

runners.name: ZELICA
runners.comment: At the latest run 2nd of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 5 len behind Nekoleto with 52.5kg at $12. The race before that 6th of 15 at Toulouse on June 8 over 2200m, 3.5 len behind Pop Life with 52.5kg at $32. Worth following.

runners.name: PRAY FOR HOPE
runners.comment: Most recently 7th of 12 at Longchamp on June 11 over 2400m, 2.5 len behind Brivido Moon with 53.5kg at $4.50. The run before that settled back and ran on when 6th of 8 at Salon-de-Provence on May 25 over 2400m, 3 len behind Hashtag Joa carrying 54kg at $6.90. Among the top chances.

runners.name: MOON OF THE NIGHT
runners.comment: Most recently 7th of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 8 len behind Nekoleto with 54.5kg at $19. The race before that 6th of 13 at Tarbes on May 11 over 2100m, slow going 3 len behind Sedition with 55kg at $16. Hard to beat on her best form.

runners.name: AMORETTI
runners.comment: Second-up. First-up after seven months 14th of 16 at La Teste De Buch on June 3 over 1900m, 12 len behind Lady Darka carrying 51.5kg at $23. Previously second-up ran last of 12 at this track on May 1 2025 over 2300m, 7 len behind Peyrassol carrying 58.5kg at $63. Expecting him to kick on with that first run out of the way.

runners.name: NIKITA DU MAZET
runners.comment: At the latest run 5th of 10 at Langon-Libourne on June 19 over 1800m, 6 len behind Wathab with 64.5kg. The run before that faded in the straight 9th of 15 at Toulouse on June 8 over 2200m, 12 len behind Pop Life carrying 53kg at $18. Can do a lot better than that last run.

runners.name: ASSIER
runners.comment: Last start 7th of 10 at Langon-Libourne on June 19 over 1800m, 9 len behind Wathab carrying 66kg. The race before that 4th in a small field at Limoges on May 17 over 2400m, slow going 2.5 len behind Agelka with 66kg. Better than the last run suggests and can make amends.

runners.name: MA CHERIE AMOUR
runners.comment: Returns from a 30-day let-up. Most recently 13th of 15 at Toulouse on June 8 over 2200m, 17 len behind Pop Life carrying 52.5kg at $47. Before that 10th of 13 at Tarbes on May 11 over 2100m, slow going 6 len behind Sedition with 54.5kg at $19. Must improve sharply.

runners.name: PINTXOPOTE
runners.comment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Not raced for 61 days. Resuming ran last in a small field at Agen on April 26 over 3200m, slow going 46 len behind Wukolina carrying 66kg. Second run from a spell 6th of 8 at Gabarret on May 8 over 2550m, 26 len behind Atlantigo carrying 54.5kg. Prepared to risk.

runners.name: ASHUTOR
runners.comment: Second-up. First-up after 10 months 13th of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 21 len behind Nekoleto carrying 51.5kg at $74. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at Cazaubon Barbotan Therme on September 1 over 3600m, on a slow track; 28 len behind Olkar carrying 64kg. Best form is over the jumps and looks safely held.

G:MEA:8:2026-07-08.comment: 1. OVERLAND BOY stalked the lead and fought on well to finish 3.5 lengths away in third (34.48) at Sandown in a Special conditions G2 over 595m. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last start despite being beaten. Deserves serious consideration. 5. MY MATE LEO hit the ground running from this same draw last time and led all the way to score (35.21) in a Grade 5 over 600m at this track. Harder here but expected to measure up. 4. FILL MY POCKETS has found the minor placings here at last couple of runs, finishing third last time beaten 2 lengths (35.35). No wins but has five minors at this course. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minor placings. Overdue and is among the main hopes. 7. GREYSYND SAMMY placed two runs ago then again in the money last time when third (34.65) at this track in a Mix 3/4.

runners.name: OVERLAND BOY
runners.comment: Hit the frame latest (34.48) when third at Sandown in a Special conditions G2. Has two successes and five minors from 10 starts from box 1. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

runners.name: MY MATE LEO
runners.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 600m in 35.21 last start, beating Maximum Reed. Expected to measure up again.

runners.name: MAXIMUM REED
runners.comment: Has been in the money at last three starts, the latest at big odds when second (35.28) at this track. Has a low draw. Has to do a bit more.

runners.name: AUNTY FAYE
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 600m at this track. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

runners.name: GREYSYND SAMMY
runners.comment: Placed last time (34.65) at this track in a Mix 3/4, finishing third and beaten 3 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and five places from 13 starts. Among the chances on best.

runners.name: FILL MY POCKETS
runners.comment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when third (35.35) over 600m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Must be included.

G:NAM:4:2026-07-08.comment: 5. STARTING POINT returned from a break with a 6 length win in an A6 at this track over 500m (30.59). Stiffer grade this time but hard to knock latest effort. CRAFTY ELMO stuck on well last time to finish a head back in second (30.31) at this track in an A4 over 500m. Can feature again. 3. AYUP CHEWIE missed the placings here most recently but can sneak into the finish with the right run.

runners.name: STARTING POINT
runners.comment: Solid performance to win by 6 lengths at this track over 500m (30.59) beating Wolf Eclipse in A6 on July 2. Back in great order and makes plenty of appeal again.

runners.name: CRAFTY ELMO
runners.comment: Rocketed out of the boxes with a scorching early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (30.31) at this track over 500m. Should be around the mark.

runners.name: AYUP CHEWIE
runners.comment: Latest effort finished last on July 1 over 500m at this track behind Aero Floral beaten 10 lengths (31.47) in an A4. Must be included.

runners.name: HONOUR FLYER
runners.comment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (30.85) over 500m at this track. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

runners.name: IN FORM LADY

runners.name: HONOUR BELLIE
runners.comment: Has finished fifth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 4.5 lengths behind Aero Floral over 500m. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

G:CNP:3:2026-07-08.comment: 1. BROWNIE POINTS finished towards the tail latest and yet to show much in two runs. Scored a Cannington trial win over 520m since. Great chance to atone. 7. PEGRUM CITY makes debut for the Enzo Crudeli kennel. Start all important and will need some luck getting across from the wide draw. Can sneak into the frame at his first appearance.

runners.name: PEGRUM CITY
runners.comment: Debutant by Orson Allen from Akachi. From the Enzo Crudeli kennel. Might pay to watch for a market push.

runners.name: KING KOMODO
runners.comment: First starter by Bernardo from Miss America. From the Krystal Shinners kennel. Market the only real guide to his chances.

runners.name: ASTON NEGRONI
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 520m at this track. Hard to tip with any confidence.

runners.name: BROWNIE POINTS
runners.comment: Finished off last campaign with a seventh (31.06) in a MDN at this track three months ago. Expected to be tough to beat.

runners.name: EXILE FURY
runners.comment: Yet to break through after five starts, the most recent result a fifth (31.41) over 520m at this track. Others rate better.

runners.name: NEGATIVE
runners.comment: Finished third last start (30.60) at big odds over 520m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Looking to others.

runners.name: GO GETTEM CHIVAS
runners.comment: First starter by Hooked On Scotch from Go Gettem Marls. Trained by Ben Abercrombie. Keep a close eye on the market.

G:NOW:10:2026-07-08.comment: 4. ZIPPING LUMIERE has shown good improvement at his last two starts, finishing in the money last time when 2nd at Richmond over 520m. Must come into calculations. 1. ZIPPING WEBB failed to come into contention last start after drifting back at this track, but prior to that won by 2 lengths at this track (30.73) beating Majestic Pearl in a Grade 5 on June 25. Yet to win out of this box but has been in the placings four times from six starts. Cannot be left out. 2. TWISTED HUXLEY produced a moderate performance last time when sixth at this track over 365m behind Princess Ada (21.65) in a Grade 5. Was in the money the start prior. Strong form has emerged from his last run. Great chance to atone. 8. ASHBY COLA gets a chance to improve on an unplaced run at his latest outing at this circuit.

runners.name: TWISTED HUXLEY
runners.comment: Missed the frame latest (21.65) when sixth over 365m at this track in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

runners.name: ASHBY COLA
runners.comment: Showed strong early pace and stuck on well despite finishing out of the placings when fourth over 630m this track in 37.15. Looks a solid contender.

runners.name: ZIPPING LUMIERE
runners.comment: In the money last time at Richmond (30.03) in a Mix, finishing a 0.8 lengths second. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Has ability and should feature.

runners.name: STILL SHADY
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (30.43) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 12 lengths. Yet to score but has placed each of two runs from this draw. Among the main chances.

runners.name: ANY MORE CARAMEL
runners.comment: Dropping back in distance from his last start when second over 630m at this track. Has struggled in the past over this trip. Not keen this time.

runners.name: ZIPPING WEBB
runners.comment: Missed the frame latest (37.36) when sixth over 630m at this track in a Mix. Yet to win but has placed four times from this draw. Looks suited and should go close.

runners.name: ANGRY GOLIATH
runners.comment: Missed the frame last start when a 13 length fifth (30.53) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at this track. Others rate better this time.

runners.name: ANOTHER ASSET
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time when seventh (30.94) at Wentworth Park in a Grade 5. Will jump from box 7 for the first time. Looking to others.

runners.name: GOLFER GIRL
runners.comment: Last start finished 5th over 365m at this track beaten 7 lengths (21.44) behind Night Country in a Grade 5 on June 25. Well placed and among the chances here.

G:ROC:8:2026-07-08.comment: 1. FAST FREDDY was sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 1.5 lengths second (23.69) over 407m at this track. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Rates highly and will give a great sight. 7. NUKA ran below best last time finishing seventh (29.52) over 498m at Townsville from Box 4. Has ability and is one of the better chances. 3. REGAL WOLF has a strong record this track and trip with 10 wins and seven placings from 27 starts. Hit the frame latest (23.54) when second at this track in a Free For All. Can feature in the finish. 2. LEGENDS TOLD comes off a (23.85) win last time, scoring by 5 lengths in a Grade 4/5 over 407m at this track. Has one wins already from this draw.

runners.name: FAST FREDDY
runners.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 1.5 lengths second (23.69) over 407m at this track. Goes very well from this draw including three wins. Leading player.

runners.name: HUDSON RIVERLINE
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 407m at this track. Can't recommend against this lot.

runners.name: REGAL WOLF
runners.comment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 2.25 lengths second but did record an exceptional 23.54 over the 407m journey. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

runners.name: UNTAMED VELOCITY
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 407m at this track. Hard to tip with any confidence.

runners.name: HOW'S WARREN
runners.comment: Has been in the money the last two runs. Finished second at this track in 23.72 last time but the start prior recorded a respectable 23.71 over 407m finishing second at this track. Prefer others this time.

runners.name: LEGENDS TOLD
runners.comment: Hit the ground running last time with a fast early split and never headed, leading throughout to win by 5 lengths (23.85) over 407m at this track. This appears within her reach.

runners.name: SIRIUS TODD
runners.comment: Good effort to win last start by a neck over 407m at this track in a handy (24.07), beating Dream Queen. Will find this a bit tougher, hard to envisage a win.

runners.name: NUKA
runners.comment: Last start finished last in a Grade 4/5 on June 16 over 498m at Townsville behind Federal Cash beaten 6 lengths (29.52). Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

G:KIK:9:2026-07-08.comment: 4. ABIGAILS MAX is progressing well and looks close to another win after hitting the frame last run (29.88) at this track. Key chance in this line up. 6. GIDDYUP ADELE drew the outside trap and was game in defeat when only a head from the winner Comer Queen (30.02) at this track. Overdue and gets her chance. 2. SWIFT QUIVER was strongly fancied on the back of a win two starts ago but finished fifth last time (30.68) at this track. Worth another chance. 1. SHOOK UP will give backers a sight.

runners.name: BREAKAWAY HUNTER
runners.comment: Going well prior to missing the frame last start when well-fancied, finishing sixth in 30.69 over 480m at this track. This will test.

runners.name: COMER HONDO
runners.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd over 480m at this track beaten one length (30.24) behind Ballygur Nelly in an A4 on July 1. Hard to have this time.

runners.name: ABIGAILS MAX
runners.comment: Improved sharply when second behind Aces Alf at this track last start over 480m (29.88). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.

runners.name: SHOOK UP
runners.comment: Has only been in the placings once from six starts. Last raced when fifth over 480m at this track a week ago. Racing well and has to be included.

runners.name: SWIFT QUIVER
runners.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 3 lengths in 29.46, beating Danny Saysta. Last start finished 5th in an A4 on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Ballygur Nelly beaten 7 lengths (30.68). Leading chance on best form.

runners.name: GIDDYUP ADELE
runners.comment: Last start finished 2nd over 480m at this track beaten a head (30.02) behind Comer Queen in an A5 on July 1. Has the ability to take this out.

runners.name: DOMINEERING

runners.name: NOIR
runners.comment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 401m at this track by 3.5 lengths in a Grade 5. In top form and can make it three straight.

runners.name: ZIPPING MONROE
runners.comment: Last start winner at this track over this distance running a time of 22.71. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

runners.name: ANJO RUBY

runners.name: LITTLE KADE
runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (18.65) over 320m at this track. Has a low draw. Others preferred.

runners.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on July 3 over 320m at this track behind Midnight Smoke beaten 2.25 lengths (18.75). Others preferred on this occasion.

runners.name: TARAWI QUEENIE
runners.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (23.18) over 401m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome. Looks to have the job ahead.

runners.name: SPRING DAZZLER
runners.comment: Could only manage seventh last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when second (23.11) over 401m at this track. Prefer the place this line-up.
